prompt: In the context of structure-based drug design, develop variants of PARP1 (Enzyme) from Homo sapiens with altered substrate specificity or improved catalytic efficiency. outline a computational methodology covering: (1) active site scaffold selection, (2) catalytic residue placement using RoseTTAFold, (3) substrate binding optimization and variant screening. Provide guidance on validation approaches and experimental follow-up.
source_citation: Derived from open_targets (24.06); target: PARP1; organism: Homo sapiens; catalogue version v1.0
